name: utopia-reviews
description: Code reviews as a two-way agent conversation on GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket. Perform a Utopia-aware, severity-ranked review of a PR/MR or a local branch pair, or resolve the review comments on your own PR end to end - triage, fix, verify, reply, and resolve.

interface.shortDescription: Two-way code-review skills across GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through both sides of a code review. utopia-code-review produces a Utopia-aware, severity-ranked review (blockers / should-fix / nits / questions) of a PR/MR or a purely local branch pair, and can post it as inline comments. utopia-resolve-code-review reads every review thread on your own PR, triages each against the code, the optional task spec, and Utopia conventions, then fixes, verifies, replies, and resolves - so one agent can review and another can resolve, using the review thread as the channel between them.
defaultPrompt: Resolve the review comments on my PR.
Review this branch against main before I open a PR.
